features.conclusion: not computable without complete curvature coefficients
features.limitation: Could be diagonal, off-diagonal, or mixed.

features.conclusion: not computable without sector curvature contraction
features.limitation: Sector representation inputs alone do not determine the curvature action.
Mirror leakage cannot be ruled out from formula scaffold alone.

features.conclusion: not computable without Hopf/base mixed curvature formula
features.limitation: Existing Hopf/base terms are represented, but the mixed remainder is not.

features.conclusion: no growth law or norm estimate is available
not proven to vanish on formal kernel

features.limitation: Commutator with the complement projector cannot be closed.

limitations: The basis action cannot be derived more strongly than the formula.
No finite-basis or analytic action matrix is introduced for an unidentified curvature term.
title: BHSM v2.8 Curvature Remainder Basis Action Report
